problem id: 783a1317
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) AND SHL(6)) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00101001 -> 01001010
  11101111 -> 11111011
  01001010 -> 10010010
  10010101 -> 00100101
  11100000 -> 00111000
  10111101 -> 01101111
  11110000 -> 00111100
  00111010 -> 00001110
  11011111 -> 10110111

query: 11111000
predicted answer: 00111110
